title: senecio micaniiformis
intro: Senecio micaniiformis, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mountain Ragwort include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. Mountain Ragwort can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in folk medicine as a poultice for various skin conditions.
